Custom Team Uniforms from Sialkot, Pakistan

July 1, 2026 | By FABRIOZA

Whether you're outfitting a youth soccer team, a corporate league, or a professional club, your uniforms represent your team's identity. At FABRIOZA, we manufacture custom team uniforms from Sialkot, Pakistan — the world's sportswear capital — with professional-grade quality, sublimation printing, and MOQ starting at just 50 pieces.

Sports We Uniform

Soccer/Football Kits

Full sublimation jerseys, shorts, and socks. Individual player names and numbers included. Home and away kit sets. Goalkeeper kits with padded designs.

Basketball Uniforms

Reversible jerseys, shooting shirts, warm-up sets. Moisture-wicking fabrics for indoor court performance. Side panel designs and bold team graphics.

Baseball/Softball

Button-up jerseys, pants, caps, and sliding shorts. Classic pinstripes or modern sublimation designs. Durable fabrics for outdoor play.

Corporate & School Uniforms

Polos, blazers, PE kits, and branded workwear. Bulk pricing for 200+ piece orders. Consistent quality across large quantities.

Sublimation vs. Traditional Decoration

FeatureSublimationScreen PrintEmbroidery
DurabilityPermanentMay crackExtremely durable
ColorsUnlimited1-6 typicalThread-limited
Names/NumbersIncluded freeExtra costExtra cost
Best ForComplex designsSimple logosBadges/crests

What's Included

  • Individual player names and numbers
  • Team logo in full color
  • Sponsor logos
  • Size run from Youth XS to Adult 4XL
  • Free digital mockup before production
  • Photo documentation of finished goods
  • Individual poly bag packaging

Get Your Team Uniform Quote

50 sets minimum. Free mockup. Names & numbers included. Quote in 24 hours.
